queries.question: In what year was the earliest game released with a rating above 8.5?
queries.sql: SELECT MIN(Release_Year) FROM VideoGames JOIN GameReviews ON GameReviews.GameId = VideoGames.id WHERE Rating > 8.5;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MIN(?release_year_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?videogames a :VideoGames .
  ?gamereviews a :GameReviews .
  ?gamereviews p:hasVideoGames ?videogames .
  ?gamereviews p:Rating ?rating_f .
  ?videogames p:Release_Year ?release_year_a .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?rating_f) > 8.5)
}

queries.question: When was the earliest game released with a rating above 8.5?
queries.sql: SELECT MIN(Release_Date) FROM VideoGames JOIN GameReviews ON GameReviews.GameId = VideoGames.id WHERE Rating > 8.5;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MIN(?release_date_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?videogames a :VideoGames .
  ?gamereviews a :GameReviews .
  ?gamereviews p:hasVideoGames ?videogames .
  ?gamereviews p:Rating ?rating_f .
  ?videogames p:Release_Date ?release_date_a .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?rating_f) > 8.5)
}

queries.question: When was the earliest game released with a rating above 8.5?
queries.sql: SELECT MIN(Release_Year, Release_Date) FROM VideoGames JOIN GameReviews ON GameReviews.GameId = VideoGames.id WHERE Rating > 8.5;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?mn WHERE { ?gr a :GameReviews ; p:hasVideoGames ?g ; p:Rating ?r . ?g p:Release_Year ?ry ; p:Release_Date ?rd . BIND(IF(STR(?ry) < STR(?rd), ?ry, ?rd) AS ?mn) FILTER(xsd:double(?r) > 8.5) }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): SQLite 2-arg MIN row-wise -> IF; GT uses MySQL LEAST; films rated>8.5

queries.question: What games are suitable for PS and what year and date were they released?
queries.sql: SELECT Name, Release_Year, Release_Date FROM VideoGames WHERE Platform LIKE '%PlayStation%';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?release_year ?release_date WHERE {
  ?videogames a :VideoGames .
  ?videogames p:name ?name .
  ?videogames p:Release_Year ?release_year .
  ?videogames p:Release_Date ?release_date .
  ?videogames p:Platform ?platform_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?platform_lk), "^.*PlayStation.*$", "i"))
}
